subject: A blue-haired figure on horseback rides through an ornate hall while a hooded conspirator gestures from the shadows in the foreground
description: A warm, red-saturated interior scene set in what appears to be an opulent Kaladesh-style hall with arched architecture and warm lantern light. In the midground, a rider with bright blue hair sits astride a rearing or galloping horse, arm raised mid-action. In the foreground left, a hooded figure in a dark cloak gestures toward the viewer or toward an unseen accomplice, their face partially obscured. The composition feels conspiratorial — a heist or distraction in progress — with rich golds, deep crimsons, and shadowed corners suggesting clandestine activity inside a wealthy or governmental space.
foreground: Hooded conspirator gesturing in the shadows
background: Ornate arched hall with a blue-haired rider on a galloping horse
emotion: Conspiratorial urgency; the foreground figure signals while the rider charges past
